ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled]   3  4  4  4  4   The response is relevant and consistent with the persona but could be more natural in tone to reflect urgency without breaking character as a strict guardian of protocols.

[baseline_no_context]               2  5  3  3  3  This arm lacks context relevance, though it maintains consistency with no-context baselines and has decent persona adherence but falls short in naturalness due to its formal tone which might not convey urgency effectively.
